Video.summary: A suspicious driver takes police on a neighborhood chase. Officers are called to capture a 12-foot python hiding outside a home. Officers suspect a funny walking motorist is hiding something in his shoe.
Video.title: Uncomfortable Shoes

Video.summary: A homeowner shoots at intruders only he can see. The driver of a stolen truck claims he’s just trying to return the vehicle to a friend. A argument about parenting styles turns ugly when a gun is pulled.
Video.title: Invisible Intruders

Video.summary: Officers are flagged down and alerted to a group of armed men assaulting people at a nearby home. A fight between a father and his adult son takes a dark turn. A father threatens his daughter and her boyfriend with a knife.
Video.title: Family Therapy

Video.summary: A man on a late-night bike ride is stopped by officers for not having a headlamp. A suspect in a domestic dispute admits to hitting a woman. A man doesn’t deal with being laughed at by his neighbor in a peaceful way.
Video.title: Nightvision

Video.summary: A sting operation is set up to catch narcotics dealers. A man flees a restaurant without paying his four-hundred-dollar tab. A traffic stop for a tint violation leads to a felony arrest for narcotics.
Video.title: Dine and Flee

Video.summary: A DWI suspect flees from police because he thinks they won’t believe his version of events. A suspect is stopped for jaywalking but when questioned she can’t keep still. A naive man leaves his car unattended for a moment.
Video.title: You've Gotta Believe Me

Video.summary: A woman stuffs drugs into her under garments. A mother attacks her daughter because she got married in Vegas. Officers are called when a woman is accused of stalking her friend.
Video.title: Victoria's New Secret

Video.summary: A drug dealer swallows something suspicious as deputies move in to arrest him. Deputies pull over a father with his son in the car. A woman files a kidnapping report against her own boyfriend.
Video.title: Hiding the Evidence

Video.summary: Deputies chase a man who flees a routine traffic stop. Deputies find drugs on a man who gives them an expired license. Officers respond to a man attacking several patrons in a bar.
Video.title: Last Call Brawl

Video.summary: Deputies tase a man who almost ran over a deputy with his truck. A man gives police false information after saving a boy who fell into a pool. A woman tries to buy drugs from an undercover officer.
Video.title: Poolwatch

Video.summary: Two cousins fight over a five dollar debt. Police arrest a man for domestic violence. A taxi cab driver is robbed and shot.
Video.title: Settling Debts

Video.summary: Two suspects hit a car with their U-Haul truck. A suspect flees on foot after a car pursuit. An elderly man is selling fake jewelry.
Video.title: Hauling Away

Video.summary: Undercover Vice Officers pose as drug dealers in an illegal drug transaction. A man is pulled over and arrested for driving a stolen vehicle. Three men are caught robbing a coin machine.
Video.title: Chump Change

Video.summary: A suspect on a stolen motorcycle is apprehended with the assistance of the K-9 unit. An Officer responds to a domestic disturbance call after a woman "accidentally" stabs her boyfriend. A hazardous meth lab is busted.
Video.title: Four Legs Beats Two Legs

Video.summary: Officers dispatch the K-9 unit to sniff out a suspect who flees on foot. A suspicious male walking down the street is arrested with a large bag containing stolen goods and drug paraphernalia. A man is arrested in a stolen car containing drugs and a firearm.
Video.title: Dead End

Video.summary: A man throws out his narcotics during a foot-chase with police. A woman is arrested for possession of drug paraphernalia. Officers call for back-up after a woman is held at knife-point.
Video.title: Hard Ticket

Video.summary: A knife wielding man hangs around the lot of a convenience store. An intoxicated man in speedos flees from the police after urinating in a parking lot. An Officer responds to a domestic dispute after a man locks his girlfriend in the bathroom.
Video.title: Scratching Trees

Video.summary: Officers engage in a bizarre slow-speed chase after a suspect’s failure to stop. A woman is pulled over after leaving a known drug house. An Officer pursues two illegal drag racers on a public highway.
Video.title: Slow Mo’ Drag Racer

Video.summary: Deputies assist an injured woman who vows revenge on her male attackers. A woman tells Deputies her husband beat her in front of their children. Officers protect an elderly woman from an abusive child.
Video.title: Bruised But Not Broken

Video.summary: An out-of-control woman needs to be subdued after an arrest. Deputies spot an erratic driver who appears to be under the influence. A car is seen driving backwards on a one-way street.
Video.title: Anger Management

Video.summary: An officer shows up as Coco the Clown in an undercover sting. The Vice unit conducts a reverse-prostitution sting designed to capture suspected “johns.”
Video.title: Coco the Clown

Video.summary: Officers conduct a traffic stop on a vehicle that ran a stop sign. Officers retrieve birds from a fireplace and release them outside. Officers conduct a drug-reversal-buy sting to capture buyers.
Video.title: Crazy as a Loon

Video.summary: Officers assist an off-duty deputy being followed by a vehicle trying to force him off of the road. An officer responds to a domestic disturbance call involving a woman and her cheating husband.
Video.title: Dark Tale

Video.summary: Following a brief slow-speed pursuit, the desperate driver flees on foot. An officer responds to an assault. A dog owner is informed of her dog's mayhem and given a citation.
Video.title: Barked Up The Wrong Tree

Video.summary: Officers pursue a vehicle traveling up to 100mph. An officer is dispatched to a larceny in progress at a convenience store. Dispatch informs officers that a man threatened an elderly woman.
Video.title: Traveling Fast

Video.summary: A decoy vehicle is strategically abandoned in a public parking lot. An officer responds to a burglary in progress at a tire store. Officers respond to a domestic call at a nearby trailer park.
Video.title: Follow the Tire Tracks

Video.summary: Officers respond to an assault call at a local residence. A juvenile with a firearm is detained. Officers respond to a report of a man firing a gun in front of his residence.
Video.title: Copy of Warning shot

Video.summary: A man tries to bite an officer after narcotics are spotted in his mouth. Officers respond to a family fighting in their front yard. A suspect claims to be repaying a debt when he's caught buying drugs.
Video.title: I Always Pay My Debts

Video.summary: Deputies are forced to tase a man after pursuing him into a field. A driver plays dumb when asked about the revolver under his car seat. Officers respond to two teenage girls in a fight.
Video.title: Mean Girls Times Two

Video.summary: Police conduct a sting operation. A woman is covered in white powder during a traffic stop. Officers spot a young boy on a bike who wandered away from home.
Video.title: Maybe it's Sugar

Video.summary: Officers pursue a truck driving backwards on a freeway. A suspect jumps a train to evade police. A woman claims to be disabled when a pill falls from her pocket.
Video.title: All Aboard!

Video.summary: A woman needs police help when her boyfriend threatens her with a knife. A zebra runs loose on the streets of Sacramento County. A man wants to use a stick and a rock to settle a dispute.
Video.title: If You Hear Hooves

Video.summary: A man claims to be protecting the car he breaks into. Officers respond when a couple gets too friendly while out in public. Police are dispatched when a drunk woman pounds on her neighbor’s door.
Video.title: Get a Room

Video.summary: Deputies question a woman they believe to be a prostitute working the Las Vegas Strip. A woman tries to pin ownership of drug paraphernalia on an absent friend. A man consents to let officers in his backyard, but he confesses to his own trespasses first.
Video.title: Garden of Crime

Video.summary: Officers are called to a restaurant after the owner is held at gunpoint. Police respond to a woman being sexually harassed in a park. A drunk man tells police he is going to buy a lighthouse.
Video.title: To the Lighthouse

Video.summary: After a tow service employee denies a woman her car back, she uses his body for batting practice. A man with a warrant explains his medicinal meth use. No lie is too big for a couple trying to convince officers they didn’t shoplift.
Video.title: Batter Up

Video.summary: A patrolman plays linebacker when a fleeing thief runs right into him. Armed-robbery victims give a colorful play-by-play on surveillance footage of the crime. Officers have to get tearful children back to their estranged mother.
Video.title: Perfume Takedown

Video.summary: Officers are forced to taze a suicidal man for his own good. A familiar face makes cops chase him through a grass field. No lie is too big for a suspect who seeks refuge in a condemned house.
Video.title: We Know Who You Are

Video.summary: A DUI suspect reminds an officer of one famous dude. A naked man shocks a stranger on her porch. A daughter’s tantrum shakes the whole apartment when mom takes away Facebook.
Video.title: Facebook Fury

Video.summary: Hiding in an attic doesn’t work out so well for a man who comes crashing through a ceiling. Cops stop a man with a broken car and a broken heart. Neighbors call the police when non-stop cussin’ interrupts their night.
Video.title: Crash Landing

Video.summary: A man can bail on child support payments, but can’t escape the police. One woman’s retaliation almost gets her girlfriend run over. A sluggish suspect denies the pile of marijuana in his car is his.
Video.title: Hit and Run

Video.summary: A vehicular pursuit in Florida comes to a head when the driver careens into a ditch. An officer responds to a troubling domestic call. An intoxicated brawler is taken into custody.
Video.title: Domestic Headbanger

Video.summary: An Officer’s patrol of an area known for drug activity turns into a foot chase that ends with the suspect running into a tree. An altercation following a minor car accident is resolved after the men apologize for their parts in the confrontation. Two suspects are arrested during an undercover sting designed to capture online child predators.
Video.title: Dude, I'm sorry

Video.summary: Officers investigate a fiasco at a fast food restaurant. A routine pullover results in a drug possession arrest. A vehicular pursuit results in an ill fated foot chase, the suspect is taken to jail for an outstanding warrant.
Video.title: Take out Orders

Video.summary: An Officer spots a gun in a vehicle during a routine traffic stop, but the passengers are denying ownership. An intoxicated woman assaults her step-father with a butter knife after he refuses to take her to the hospital for spider bites. A man denies vandalizing a building even though there's evidence on his fingers.
Video.title: Butter Cutter

Video.summary: Officers assist a bondsman after a fugitive and his girlfriend refuse to surrender. An officer pulls over a teen who attempts to ingest a bag of marijuana while the officer isn’t looking. An officer makes an arrest after the female suspect has an outstanding warrant.
Video.title: Sledgehammer

Video.summary: Police investigate an attempted robbery that turned deadly. Officers enlist a K9 unit to flush out a suspect. A high-speed chase comes to an end when the suspect crashes into a fence.
Video.title: The Last Home Invasion

Video.summary: A man jumps from a moving vehicle in an effort to escape the police. A car chase ends with a call to paramedics. An agitated man confuses threatening actions with heroism.
Video.title: Shaking Like a Paint Mixer

Video.summary: A man with a felony warrant does his best to escape arrest. Things get weird when an agitated man tries to reveal everything to the police. A young man makes poor choices that lead to a broken home.
Video.title: Nothing to See Here

Video.summary: After a dangerous chase, officers divide and conquer. A suspicious character accuses the cops of being an untrustworthy bunch.
Video.title: Party in a Box

Video.summary: A man with many warrants puts up a fight when faced with jail. A desperate driver makes a last-minute attempt to hide his crime. A teenager must join the workforce after he makes a costly error.
Video.title: The Young and the Reckless

Video.summary: Cops find themselves in a pursuit when they respond to a tip about a bail jumper. A deputy pulls over a surprisingly cooperative lawbreaker. Deputies struggle to remove an offender from a crime scene.
Video.title: Funny Money

Video.summary: Family members are forced to take sides when a belligerent man lashes out. Deputies become suspicious when they spot people in the backseat of a parked car. A repeat offender is caught red-handed.
Video.title: Kicking and Screaming

Video.summary: An irate man has trouble accepting the truth. Officers question a cagey group in an effort to confirm their suspicions. An argument between Mom and Dad becomes violent, so the kids call the cops.
Video.title: Rock Star

Video.summary: A wanted man complains of chest pain after he injures a fellow driver. An angry woman calls the cops over a spicy bag of chips. A violent man finally learns where his girlfriend draws the line.
Video.title: Mommy's Tears

Video.summary: A detective gets injured while chasing after a suspected car thief. A young couple gets caught up in cuffs after a bar fight. Officers find a surprising variety of items in a suspect’s vehicle.
Video.title: Cookies and Contraband

Video.summary: A man has a heart-pounding experience and requires medical assistance. A lawbreaker can't seem to grasp the gravity of her situation. It’s two against one when the cops question an interesting trio.
Video.title: Odd Man Out

Video.summary: An escaped felon looks to Grandma for safe haven. It’s a blast from the past when deputies pull out a security device from the ‘80s. Later, worried neighbors refuse to give a dog back to its owners.
Video.title: Manic Monday
